decisions.title: Clinical Data Management Specialist
decisions.reason: Skip — different discipline; role is focused on clinical data management, while candidate prefers public health and research roles.

decisions.title: Senior Clinical Programmer
decisions.reason: Skip — seniority mismatch; this is a Senior role, while candidate is mid-level.

decisions.title: Biospecimen Research Coordinator
decisions.reason: Strong fit — Biospecimen Research Coordinator role aligns with candidate's public health background and mid-level experience, plus it offers H1B sponsorship.

intent.aboutCandidate: Public health professional on F1 OPT with biostatistics and data analytics strengths; mid-level; open to research and coordinator roles in healthcare and public health organisations.
intent.remarks: Do not push Associate Director level roles.
